languages.text: "...подвергнувшиеся непредсказуемым изменениям под воздействием эмпирей. Мне удалось разыскать несколько мутировавших особей в данном регионе, которые помогли завершить другие экспозиции с подобными созданиями".

traits.locale_text: "Мутировавшие представители примитивной цивилизации, подвергнувшиеся непредсказуемым изменениям под воздействием эфира. Мне удалось разыскать лишь несколько достойных коллекции особей в данном регионе, поэтому локальная экспозиция... считается неполноценной".

languages.text: "...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."
languages.original_text: "...подвергнувшиеся непредсказуемым изменениям под воздействием эмпирей. Мне удалось разыскать несколько мутировавших особей в данном регионе, которые помогли завершить другие экспозиции с подобными созданиями".

traits.locale_text: "...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

"...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

"Mutated members of a primitive civilisation that have undergone unpredictable changes under the influence of the Aether. I have only been able to find a few collection-worthy specimens in this region, so the present exhibit... is considered incomplete."

"...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

"...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

languages.text: “……它们在亚空间的影响下经历了不可预测的变化。我已在该区域发现数个变异标本，这得以填补诸多空白，并完善了那些原本就包含此类生物的展品。”
languages.original_text: "...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

traits.locale_text: “……它们在亚空间的影响下经历了不可预测的变化。我已在该区域发现数个变异标本，这得以填补诸多空白，并完善了那些原本就包含此类生物的展品。”

languages.text: « ... qui ont subi des altérations imprévisibles sous les influences empyréennes. Dans cette région, j'ai trouvé quelques spécimens présentant des mutations, ce qui m'a permis de compléter mes connaissances, ainsi que d'autres pièces d'exposition où de telles créatures étaient présentes. »
languages.original_text: "...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

traits.locale_text: « ... qui ont subi des altérations imprévisibles sous les influences empyréennes. Dans cette région, j'ai trouvé quelques spécimens présentant des mutations, ce qui m'a permis de compléter mes connaissances, ainsi que d'autres pièces d'exposition où de telles créatures étaient présentes. »

languages.text: «... sufrido cambios impredecibles bajo el influjo del Empíreo. He podido encontrar varios especímenes mutantes en la región, pudiendo completar numerosas ausencias en otras exposiciones con criaturas similares».
languages.original_text: "...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

traits.locale_text: «... sufrido cambios impredecibles bajo el influjo del Empíreo. He podido encontrar varios especímenes mutantes en la región, pudiendo completar numerosas ausencias en otras exposiciones con criaturas similares».

languages.text: "Ampirik etkiler altında öngörülemeyen değişimler geçirmiş. Bu bölgede birkaç mutasyona uğramış numune bulabildim, bu da birçok boşluğu doldurmama ve bu tür yaratıkların bulunduğu diğer sergileri tamamlamama olanak sağladı."
languages.original_text: "...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

traits.locale_text: "Ampirik etkiler altında öngörülemeyen değişimler geçirmiş. Bu bölgede birkaç mutasyona uğramış numune bulabildim, bu da birçok boşluğu doldurmama ve bu tür yaratıkların bulunduğu diğer sergileri tamamlamama olanak sağladı."

languages.text: "... die unglaubliche Veränderungen unter empyrischem Einfluss durchlaufen haben. Ich habe in dieser Region mehrere mutierte Versuchsstücke gefunden, mit denen ich zahlreiche Lücken schließen und andere Ausstellungen mit derartigen Kreaturen vervollständigen konnte."
languages.original_text: "...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

traits.locale_text: "... die unglaubliche Veränderungen unter empyrischem Einfluss durchlaufen haben. Ich habe in dieser Region mehrere mutierte Versuchsstücke gefunden, mit denen ich zahlreiche Lücken schließen und andere Ausstellungen mit derartigen Kreaturen vervollständigen konnte."

languages.text: 「...経験の影響で予測不可能な変化を遂げたもの。この地域では変異した個体数名を発見することができ、それにより、多くの欠陥を補い、そのような生物が存在した展示物を完成させることができたのです。」
languages.original_text: "...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."

traits.locale_text: 「...経験の影響で予測不可能な変化を遂げたもの。この地域では変異した個体数名を発見することができ、それにより、多くの欠陥を補い、そのような生物が存在した展示物を完成させることができたのです。」
